title: knautia angustata
intro: Knautia angustata, also known as narrow-leaved knawel, is a perennial plant in the figwort family, native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Knautia angustata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Knautia angustata are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and alleviate various health issues.
